UG-44  NOZZLE NECK THICKNESS. (a) The minimum thickness of nozzle necks shall be the greater of: (1) the thickness required by UG-27 for internal pressure, using the nozzle inside diameter; or (2) the thickness required for external loads. (b) In no case shall the nozzle neck thickness be less than the minimum wall thickness specified in this paragraph. (c) Nozzle neck dimensions shall conform to UG-45. Reinforcement of the opening shall be in accordance with UG-37 within the limits defined by UG-40. Nozzle-to-shell welds shall comply with UW-49 and shall have a minimum size as required by UW-16. See also UW-15 for acceptable nozzle attachment details.
